---
title: "Deployment and Monitoring"
format: html
---

LLM Engineering Platform:

- [LangFuse](https://langfuse.com/watch-demo)
  - [Run LangFuse Locally](https://langfuse.com/guides/videos/run-langfuse-locally)

Deploy:

- [DeepChat](https://deepchat.dev/)
- [ChainLit](https://docs.chainlit.io/deploy/overview)
